subject: Bulma — a woman with short teal hair wearing a pink outfit, standing indoors in a domestic or lab setting, gesturing warmly
description: A woman with short teal hair stands indoors, wearing a pink outfit. She is posed in a warm, approachable manner — the overall body language reads as domestic support rather than combat. The interior setting features a visible window or light source behind her and what appears to be shelving or interior furnishings, suggesting a home or laboratory context. The lighting is soft and warm. This card breaks from the combat aesthetic of most of the set — it is a calm, character-portrait composition emphasizing reliability and warmth rather than fighting power.
foreground: Teal-haired woman in pink, standing in friendly warm pose
background: Indoor domestic or lab interior with soft window light
